title: Desire Paths
description: Walking on dirt and grass changes them. Fully configurable!
body: ## Summary A simple mod that makes blocks transform when players walk on them. ## Links [](https://bisecthosting.com/Insane) [](https://www.patreon.com/insane96mcp) [](https://discord.gg/mUaszws) ## The mod By default, Grass Blocks are transformed to Dirt and Dirt to Coarse Dirt. Tall grass is also broken. Blocks transformed, chance and tall grass breaking are configurable. ![Desire Paths showcase](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/435418736594386944/1248573232081141771/2024-06-0711-38-04-ezgif.com-optimize.gif?ex=666427ef&is=6662d66f&hm=1055b65de729137009a681af731c7de5b384c0984ce2808b4315a2ca48522d1b&=) This mod was part of [IguanaTweaks Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iguanatweaks-reborn) ## Modpack Permissions Go on.
